summary: Iteration 7: Licence Contacts tab + referral_source detection. Backend created /app/backend/tests/test_phase1_licence.py with 16 new tests — 16/16 PASS (tab filters, move target=licence, move licence-in-pipeline back, licence→franchise source change, bulk-move to licence, intake referral_source for form 32/17/1, plus 6 unit tests on _detect_referral_source helper). Frontend Playwright on public URL verified: 4 tabs (mode-pipeline, mode-franchise, mode-licence, mode-general) render in correct order; Licence Contacts header shows 1 record (Sally Hare) with LICENCE pill; drawer for Sally shows LICENCE pill + Instagram referral badge + 'Heard about Creative Mojo via Instagram'; row Move dropdown shows 4 options with current-tab disabled (verified on Licence and Franchise rows); bulk-move dropdown shows 4 options with current-tab disabled; pipeline kanban cards all have FRANCHISE pill + border-l-stone-500 (50/50 sampled); moved a temporary licence_enquiry to pipeline and confirmed the kanban card has LICENCE pill + border-l-indigo-500, then cleaned up.

minor.issue: Carry-over from iteration 5/6: legacy→web_form_contacts migration is non-atomic (insert then delete). target=licence inherits the same pattern. Wrap in try/except rollback or a single MongoDB transaction.

action_items: (Optional, carry-over) Wrap legacy-move in _move_one_contact (target in {pipeline, franchise, licence}) with rollback on contacts.delete_one failure.
(Carry-over) server.py is now 1260 lines; consider splitting into auth / contacts / intake / migration modules.
(Carry-over) ContactsPage.js is 615 lines; consider extracting SourcePill, ReferralBadge, MoveMenu, ContactDrawer into separate files.
critical_code_review_comments: _detect_referral_source correctly handles BOTH the single-labelled question and Gravity Forms spread-key pattern, and canonicalises X / Twitter / instagram / facebook etc. via REFERRAL_CANONICAL. The 'Instagram Name' duplicate-key skip works.

FORM_IDS_IN_PIPELINE = set() means ALL new intake submissions land in their respective tab (franchise/licence/general) — no longer auto-promoted. This is the intended behaviour change; admins must manually push to pipeline.

tab=licence and tab=franchise filters now strictly partition on source (licence_enquiry vs franchise_enquiry). Iteration 6 tests that asserted franchise tab included licence records will fail — intentional, not a regression.
Move target=franchise on a licence_enquiry rewrites source to franchise_enquiry (and vice-versa) — verified end-to-end. Intentional behaviour: lets admins reclassify accidentally-routed enquiries.

Pipeline kanban card visual differentiation (FRANCHISE stone vs LICENCE indigo) is rendered via SOURCE_STYLE map and applied via class string interpolation (border-l-4 + border-l-{stone|indigo}-500). Verified live in DOM.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_phase1_licence.py (NEW — 16 tests, in-place cleanup, no migration run)

success_rate.frontend: 100% — all required UI assertions pass: 4 tabs in order, Licence Contacts header + 1 row (Sally Hare), drawer (LICENCE pill + Instagram badge + 'Heard about Creative Mojo via Instagram'), per-row Move dropdown 4 options w/ current-tab disabled (licence + franchise tabs), bulk-move dropdown 4 options w/ current-tab disabled, kanban cards FRANCHISE+stone border, dynamic licence-pushed-to-pipeline card LICENCE+indigo border.

seed_data_creation: test_phase1_licence.py creates 13 short-lived web_form_contacts via /api/intake/gravity-forms with entry_id prefix 'TEST-lic-' and deletes them in finally blocks. The Sally Hare licence record (id discoverable via GET /api/contacts?tab=licence) was NOT mutated. Frontend test created+pushed-to-pipeline+deleted one extra temp licence record. No persistent state changes.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite is now 7 files. Run with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL exported: `python -m pytest backend/tests/test_phase1_licence.py -v`. Other suites (backend_test.py, test_phase1_crm.py, test_phase1_ux.py) hard-assert legacy_general_enquiry counts (~7632) — they still drift by 1-2 every time test_phase1_move.py or test_phase1_licence.py runs (legacy mutations). Iteration 6 tests that asserted franchise tab returns 1,675+ records (including licence) will now return 1,253 — INTENTIONAL behaviour change for this iteration, not a regression. New testids verified in this iteration: mode-licence, row-move-{id}-licence, bulk-move-licence, plus existing source pill / drawer referral icons. _detect_referral_source helper is importable from server module and unit-testable independently.
rca of the issue: No bug fix requested. All 4 review-request areas implemented correctly: (1) tab=licence filter, (2) move target=licence, (3) intake referral_source extraction supports both single-label and spread-key Gravity Forms patterns with canonical Instagram/Facebook/X/TikTok/Google/Friend/Word of Mouth/Other, (4) UI: Licence Contacts tab, indigo source pill + matching kanban border, drawer referral badge with social icon and 'Heard about Creative Mojo via <X>' line. FORM_IDS_IN_PIPELINE=set() correctly routes all new intake to non-pipeline tabs.
